title: luzula campestris subsp. erecta
intro: Luzula campestris subsp. erecta, also known as upright woodrush, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Juncaceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help relieve coughs and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Luzula campestris subsp. erecta include its ability to soothe sore throats and reduce inflammation in the body. It is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused in oil for topical use.
